description: Tracking record for the two data-use permission requests that gate ONLY the future geometryStatus:'licensed' primary-geometry path for Phase A7 Conflict Theaters. Non-sensitive: no personal email addresses, no message bodies, no credentials, no source geometry, and no permission claim not received in writing. A pending record is NOT consent; silence is NOT consent.

requests.notes: Official route is the DeepStateMap API/commercial data-use request form. Agent cannot submit the form; founder submits and overwrites sentAt with the real submission timestamp. status stays 'pending' until a written grant arrives. Draft does NOT claim permission and does NOT present the current link-out/fallback posture as licensed use.

ISW Fair Use and Attribution Policy explicitly requires prior written permission to incorporate ISW/CTP materials into other datasets, mapping platforms, analytic products, or systems, and bars bulk/API/automated redistribution. Draft acknowledges this policy and asks whether additional rights-holder approval is required. Agent cannot send the email; founder sends and overwrites sentAt with the real timestamp. status stays 'pending' until a written grant arrives.
